hero.title: A simple system to reveal your **life patterns**.
hero.description: Understand what really works for you — **without pressure or guilt**. Track your habits and discover your rhythm naturally.

email_capture.title: Stay in the loop
email_capture.description: Get insights about productivity and follow our journey. No spam, just useful content.

advantage_01.title: See your progress toward goals
advantage_01.description: Watch how your habits move you forward — without guilt or pressure.

advantage_02.title: Discover your patterns
advantage_02.description: Understand where you thrive and where you can grow, without judgment.

advantage_03.title: Your rhythm over time
advantage_03.description: Build consistency naturally. Patterns, not pressure.

advantage_04.title: Insights about your journey
advantage_04.description: Visual clarity on what works for you — not just numbers.

desktop.title: Desktop Platform
desktop.description: Our desktop platform is now available for use.

mobile.title: Mobile Platform
mobile.description: Our mobile apps are under construction and will be ready for use soon.

world.title: World Foundation Integration
world.description: Integration with World Chain is coming soon, bringing challenges, integrations, and WLD token rewards!

cta.title: You're one step away from having total control of your behavior!
cta.description: Within the platform, you have the opportunity to know where to improve in your life and achieve your goals!

proof_01.title: Your progress at a glance
proof_01.description:
See how far you've come with a clear overview of your habits.

No complicated dashboards — just honest feedback about your journey.

proof_02.title: Organize your time visually
proof_02.description:
A calendar view that shows your consistency over weeks and months.

Spot patterns and celebrate progress without obsessing over perfect streaks.

proof_03.title: Reflect and grow
proof_03.description:
Your personal journal to understand what's working and what isn't.

Self-knowledge is the foundation of lasting change.

proof_04.title: Insights that matter
proof_04.description:
Simple analytics that help you understand your behavior.

Know where to focus your energy for real improvement.

footer.work_in_progress: We're working to make this feature available soon!
